svg.text: Physical AI Agent — Week 5 build reference
Each solenoid: one lead → a header pin, other lead → +12V rail.
0.1µF ceramic across VCC–GND of every chip (22 total).
B. Unit cell — one 595 + one ULN2803A (identical ×11: build one, repeat)
1. Solder IC sockets first — align all pin-1 notches the same way.
2. Run the bus rails (+5V, GND, clock, latch) as straight,
parallel wires across the whole board.
3. Chain Q7′→DS between adjacent 595s — short, equal jumpers.
4. Wire each 595’s 8 outputs to its ULN’s IN1–IN8.
5. 0.1µF at every chip’s VCC–GND; 4700µF on the 12V rail.
6. Continuity-test every net BEFORE power. First power-up: 5V only.
7. Bend solid-core at 90°, trim flush, one color per net.
